'''Daktar Bloodmoon''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] member of the [[Sith Shadows]] who had a [[Cybernetics/Legends|cybernetic]] arm. He was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] individual who was sent to kill [[Mellichae]] by the [[Old Man (Dathomir)|Old Man]].
